I7900 No Active Disease Code - The data in this column indicates that the patient had none of the active diagnoses at the time of admission. CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates that the patient had none of the active diagnoses at the time of admission. 0 = No
1 = Yes
388 J1750_HSTRY_OF_FLS_IND J1750_HSTRY_OF_FLS_IND J1750 History of Falls Code - The data in this column indicates whether the patient had two or more falls in the past year or any fall with injury within the past year. CHAR 1
